title: Kody Engine Lite Configuration
description: Configuration for the Kody autonomous SDLC pipeline. See https://github.com/aharonyaircohen/Kody-Engine-Lite

quality.description: Quality gate commands run during the verify stage. Leave empty string to skip.

typecheck.description: TypeScript type checking command (e.g., 'pnpm typecheck', 'pnpm tsc --noEmit')

lint.description: Lint command (e.g., 'pnpm lint'). Empty to skip.

lintFix.description: Auto-fix lint command, run when verify fails (e.g., 'pnpm lint:fix')

formatFix.description: Auto-fix format command, run when verify fails (e.g., 'pnpm format')

testUnit.description: Unit test command. Use test:unit to exclude integration/e2e tests (e.g., 'pnpm test:unit')

defaultBranch.description: Default branch for PR base and branch syncing (e.g., 'main', 'dev')

github.description: GitHub repository settings. Auto-detected from git remote by init.

postSummary.description: Post a structured pipeline summary comment on the issue after completion. Default: true in CI, false locally.

timeouts.description: Per-stage timeout overrides in seconds. Defaults: taskify=600, plan=600, build=2400, verify=300, review=600, review-fix=1200, ship=240

issueContext.description: kody2: how many and how much of the issue's comments the agent sees in its prompt. Higher = more context but larger prompts. Defaults: 50 comments, 10000 bytes each.

commentLimit.description: Max number of comments (most recent first) to include in the agent prompt. Default: 50.

commentMaxBytes.description: Max bytes per comment before truncation. Default: 10000.

testRequirements.description: kody2 enforces that newly added files matching `pattern` ship with a sibling test file matching `requireSibling`. Misses fail the run; the agent gets one retry with the gap as feedback. Empty array or absent = no enforcement.

pattern.description: Glob-style pattern (* within segment, ** across segments). Example: 'src/app/api/**/route.ts'

requireSibling.description: Sibling test path template. Tokens: {name} (filename without ext), {ext} (e.g. .ts). Example: '{name}.test{ext}'

model.description: Single 'provider/model' string used by kody2 (single-session pipeline). Use 'claude/...' or 'anthropic/...' for direct Anthropic API; anything else routes through LiteLLM proxy.

modelMap.description: Maps model tiers to 'provider/model' strings. Use 'claude/...' or 'anthropic/...' for direct Anthropic API; anything else routes through LiteLLM proxy.

strong.description: Strongest 'provider/model' for plan, review — deep reasoning (e.g., 'claude/claude-opus-4-6')

defaultRunner.description: Name of the default runner when multiple runners are configured (advanced)

stageRunners.description: Per-stage runner assignment (advanced). Maps stage name to runner name.

default.description: Default 'provider/model' string applied to every stage. Use 'claude/<model>' for direct Anthropic API; anything else routes through LiteLLM proxy. Overridden by entries in 'stages'.

stages.description: Per-stage 'provider/model' overrides. Takes precedence over 'default' and 'modelMap'.

escalateOnTimeout.description: Escalate to a stronger model tier when a stage times out and retries. Default: true.

watch.description: Kody Watch — periodic health monitoring. Runs every 30 minutes via GitHub Actions to check pipeline health, security, and configuration.

activityLog.description: GitHub issue number for posting activity log reports. Auto-created by bootstrap.

model.description: 'provider/model' string for watch agents. Falls back to agent.modelMap.cheap if not set.

decompose.description: Decompose command configuration for splitting complex tasks into parallel sub-tasks.

enabled.description: Enable the decompose command. Default: true.

maxParallelSubTasks.description: Maximum number of sub-tasks to build in parallel. Default: 3.

minComplexityScore.description: Minimum complexity score (1-10) for a task to be decomposed. Set lower to decompose more tasks. Default: 4.

mcp.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server configuration. Enables external tools like browser automation.

servers.description: Named MCP server definitions. Each key is a server name.

command.description: Command to start the MCP server (e.g., 'npx')

env.description: Environment variables for the server process

stages.description: Stages that can use MCP tools. Defaults to ["build", "verify", "review", "review-fix"]

devServer.description: DEPRECATED: Use top-level devServer instead. Kept for backward compatibility.

command.description: Command to start the dev server (e.g., 'pnpm dev')

url.description: URL where the dev server will be accessible (e.g., 'http://localhost:3000')

readyPattern.description: Regex pattern to match in stdout when server is ready. Default: 'Ready in|compiled|started server|Local:'

readyTimeout.description: Seconds to wait for the server to be ready. Default: 180

release.description: Release automation configuration. Used by 'kody-engine release' command.

versionFiles.description: Files containing version strings to update on release. Default: ["package.json"]

publishCommand.description: Shell command to run after tagging for publishing. Empty = skip. NOT hardcoded to any registry.

notifyCommand.description: Shell command for post-release notifications. $VERSION is interpolated at runtime. Empty = skip.

e2eCommand.description: Shell command to run E2E tests as a release gate. Runs before publishCommand. $VERSION is interpolated at runtime. Empty = skip (no E2E gate).

timeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for e2eCommand, publishCommand, and notifyCommand. Default: 600000 (10 minutes).

releaseBranch.description: Production branch — E2E gates PRs into this branch. Release PR targets git.defaultBranch. Defaults to 'main'.

labels.description: Labels to add to the release PR. Default: ["release"]

draftRelease.description: Create GitHub Releases as drafts. Default: false

devServer.description: Dev server configuration for browser tool verification. Works with any provider (MCP or CLI-based).

command.description: Command to start the dev server (e.g., 'pnpm dev')

url.description: URL where the dev server will be accessible (e.g., 'http://localhost:3000')

readyPattern.description: Regex pattern to match in stdout when server is ready. Default: 'Ready in|compiled|started server|Local:'

readyTimeout.description: Seconds to wait for the server to be ready. Default: 180
